events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the oversized backfill lifts (~18–24 in, versus an ~8–12 in spec max) exceed the compactor's effective depth of influence, risking under-compacted pipe bedding, voids at the haunches, and future settlement/pipe deflection — a fail requiring removal and re-placement in compliant lifts with density verification before cover, per project specs and IPC 306.
